---
title: "Selena Esteves"
subtitle: "Masters Student"
description: "Brief description of research interests and role in the lab. Edit this file to customize your profile."
image: avatar.jpg
group: grad
order: 1
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
![](avatar.jpg)

# Graduate Student Name {.name}

::: {.subtitle}
Ph.D. Student | Department of Psychology | Western University
:::

:::

## About

A short paragraph describing your background, how you joined the lab, and your current research focus.

## Research Interests

- Interest area 1
- Interest area 2
- Interest area 3

## Education

- **M.A.** — University Name
- **B.A.** — University Name

## Contact

- {{< fa envelope >}} [email@uwo.ca](mailto:email@uwo.ca)
- {{< fa brands google-scholar >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID)
- {{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/username)
